'''dojashaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:equiangle|equiangle]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-j-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:equiangle|equiangle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dojashaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dojashithi|dojashithi]] || [[word:dojashiji|dojashiji]] || [[word:dojashishi|dojashishi]] || [[word:dojashiki|dojashiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dojashuthuthu|dojashuthuthu]] || [[word:dojashujuju|dojashujuju]] || [[word:dojashushushu|dojashushushu]] || [[word:dojashukuku|dojashukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dojashuthu|dojashuthu]] || [[word:dojashuju|dojashuju]] || [[word:dojashushu|dojashushu]] || [[word:dojashuku|dojashuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dojashufthuf|dojashufthuf]] || [[word:dojashufjuf|dojashufjuf]] || [[word:dojashufshuf|dojashufshuf]] || [[word:dojashufkuf|dojashufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dojashethe|dojashethe]] || [[word:dojasheje|dojasheje]] || [[word:dojasheshe|dojasheshe]] || [[word:dojasheke|dojasheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dojashothotho|dojashothotho]] || [[word:dojashojojo|dojashojojo]] || [[word:dojashoshosho|dojashoshosho]] || [[word:dojashokoko|dojashokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dojashotho|dojashotho]] || [[word:dojashojo|dojashojo]] || [[word:dojashosho|dojashosho]] || [[word:dojashoko|dojashoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dojashofthof|dojashofthof]] || [[word:dojashofjof|dojashofjof]] || [[word:dojashofshof|dojashofshof]] || [[word:dojashofkof|dojashofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dojashĂŻfthĂŻf|dojashĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dojashĂŻfjĂŻf|dojashĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dojashĂŻfshĂŻf|dojashĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dojashĂŻfkĂŻf|dojashĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dojashĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|dojashĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dojashĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|dojashĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dojashĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|dojashĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dojashĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|dojashĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dojashĂŻfthĂŻf|dojashĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dojashĂŻfjĂŻf|dojashĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dojashĂŻfshĂŻf|dojashĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dojashĂŻfkĂŻf|dojashĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dojashĂŻfthĂŻf|dojashĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dojashĂŻfjĂŻf|dojashĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dojashĂŻfshĂŻf|dojashĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dojashĂŻfkĂŻf|dojashĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dojashĂŠthĂŠ|dojashĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:dojashĂŠjĂŠ|dojashĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:dojashĂŠshĂŠ|dojashĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:dojashĂŠkĂŠ|dojashĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dojashathatha|dojashathatha]] || [[word:dojashajaja|dojashajaja]] || [[word:dojashashasha|dojashashasha]] || [[word:dojashakaka|dojashakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dojashatha|dojashatha]] || [[word:dojashaja|dojashaja]] || [[word:dojashasha|dojashasha]] || [[word:dojashaka|dojashaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dojashafthaf|dojashafthaf]] || [[word:dojashafjaf|dojashafjaf]] || [[word:dojashafshaf|dojashafshaf]] || [[word:dojashafkaf|dojashafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:dojashasha|dojashasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:dojashshĂ«asha|dojashshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dojashroasha|dojashroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dojashmuasha|dojashmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:dojashyaasha|dojashyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godojashnkshĂ«asha|godojashnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godojashnkroasha|godojashnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godojashnkmuasha|godojashnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godojashnkyaasha|godojashnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:dojajashasha|dojajashasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dojajashshĂ«asha|dojajashshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dojajashroasha|dojajashroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dojajashmuasha|dojajashmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dojajashyaasha|dojajashyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godojajashnkshĂ«asha|godojajashnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godojajashnkroasha|godojajashnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godojajashnkmuasha|godojajashnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godojajashnkyaasha|godojajashnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:dejĂŠshasha|dejĂŠshasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dejĂŠshshĂ«asha|dejĂŠshshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dejĂŠshroasha|dejĂŠshroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dejĂŠshmuasha|dejĂŠshmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dejĂŠshyaasha|dejĂŠshyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godejĂŠshnkshĂ«asha|godejĂŠshnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godejĂŠshnkroasha|godejĂŠshnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godejĂŠshnkmuasha|godejĂŠshnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godejĂŠshnkyaasha|godejĂŠshnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:dojfashasha|dojfashasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dojfashshĂ«asha|dojfashshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dojfashroasha|dojfashroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dojfashmuasha|dojfashmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dojfashyaasha|dojfashyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godojfashnkshĂ«asha|godojfashnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godojfashnkroasha|godojfashnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godojfashnkmuasha|godojfashnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godojfashnkyaasha|godojfashnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
